title: SmartWheelTradingViewAlert
description: Canonical webhook payload emitted by the Smart Wheel Signals Pine Script indicator and consumed by POST /api/tv/webhook. All fields are optional except ticker and signal, but the engine enriches richer payloads more usefully.

ticker.description: Symbol being alerted (uppercased by the engine). Example: MU, AAPL, SPY.

signal.description: One of the zone flags the Pine script can fire.

price.description: Close of the bar on which the alert fired.

timeframe.description: TradingView interval string at alert time. Example: 1D, 240, 60.

source.description: Indicator identifier so the engine can distinguish alerts from multiple Pine scripts.

timestamp.description: Alert time as rendered by {{time}}. The engine accepts any ISO-like string and stores it verbatim.

phase.description: Volatility-lifecycle phase as classified by the Pine indicator. The engine uses this as a cross-check.

bb_width_pctl.description: Percentile rank of current Bollinger-band width in the lookback window (0-100).

secret.description: Shared secret validated against TV_WEBHOOK_SECRET when the env var is set. Not required for local deployments.
